_comment: Canonical Claude plugin manifest template. Rendered by Publish-Agents.ps1 (Job 3) into agents/{AGENT_NAME}/.claude-plugin/plugin.json. Placeholders: reporting, 1.0.0, CE SSRS + Power BI (CE data and BYOD-exposed F&O data). F&O native SSRS stays in d365-fo agent, standard. See ADR-0004 for the plugin-distribution rationale.
name: spec-driven-dev-reporting
description: CE SSRS + Power BI (CE data and BYOD-exposed F&O data). F&O native SSRS stays in d365-fo agent

_meta.do-not-edit: Generated file. Hand-edits fail .github/workflows/check-publish-drift.yml. Author lives at tools/sync/plugin.template.json.
